caption: The video features a static image with a dark background and a central red circular area containing text. The text is a religious quote from 1 Peter 2:24, which reads, "He Himself bore our sins in His body on the Cross so that we might die to sin and live to righteousness; for by His stripes you were healed." The text is presented in a clear, white font that stands out against the red background. In the bottom left corner, there is a small text that reads "Roseline K," likely indicating the creator or contributor of the video. The scene remains unchanged throughout the frames, suggesting a moment of reflection or emphasis on the message conveyed by the scripture.
